title: Setup Kube
description: Scaffold src/kube/ Kubernetes manifests (Deployment, Service, optional Ingress) for an NX project

project.description: Name of the NX project to configure
project.x-prompt: Which project do you want to configure?

namespace.x-prompt: Which Kubernetes namespace should this deploy to?

port.x-prompt: Which port does the container expose?

registry.x-prompt: Docker registry host for the image reference?

imageName.description: Image name. Defaults to the NX project name.

ingressHost.description: Ingress hostname (e.g. myapp.elden-core.fr). Required when withIngress is true.

withTls.description: Add TLS/cert-manager annotations to the Ingress
